title: Block Display Vanilla Maker
body:
# ABOUT

**Block Display Vanilla Maker** - plugin that allows you to use [Block Display](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Display), introduced since version 1.19.4, on the server with survival, without command blocks! Supported versions: 1.19.4 - 1.21.5 and higher. ![alt text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yHOSYVLn/images/0b81b7e97717ec77f83b6026db737b170bd8dea4.jpeg) ## The mechanics of adding Block Display to the world are simple: - Create a model in [BDEngine](https://bdengine.app/). - Copy command - Insert a command into a book (mod for text insertion: [Textbook](https://modrinth.com/mod/textbook) and its library [Fireplace Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fireplace-lib)) - Sign the book under the name “**BDModel**” (you can disable this check in the plugin config). - Hold the book in your right hand and command /bdvm create. ## Video guide: ## Limitation: - A command longer than 100 pages can crash the client game. - Move, rotate, resize cannot be changed. ## Commands: - Create BD: **/bdvm create** - Delete BD: **/bdvm delete [distance]** - Restart the plugin: **/bdvm reload** ## Resolution: - **bdvm.create** - to use /bdvm create - **bdvm.remove** - to use /bdvm remove - **bdvm.reload** - to use /bdvm reload _p.s. Most likely the plugin will not be updated, so it is covered by the MIT license, you can modify it according to your needs._
